title: Minimum Spanning Trees and Network Design · Structure Brief: Mst Nonuniqueness
summary: Connect sites at minimum build cost while explaining redundancy limits. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 mst nonuniqueness increment in a minimum-network design and sensitivity brief. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Detect ties and avoid claiming uniqueness without sufficient weight conditions.
Run Prim with frontier priorities and stale-entry handling.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
